title: Fast language model
description: Compact chat, lightweight metadata summaries, routing labels, and smoke-test prompts.
deliveryGuidance: Use for quick bundle descriptions and offline delivery notes.

title: Vision-capable responses model
description: Image understanding, video-frame classification, screenshot summaries, and visual asset tags.
deliveryGuidance: Use with Paperboy's Foundry Local image/video metadata pipeline.

title: General local reasoning model
description: Document summarization, bundle manifests, policy notes, and concise agent instructions.
deliveryGuidance: Use for rich sidecar metadata over text-heavy bundles.

title: Audio transcription model
description: Fast speech-to-text for lightweight audio clips before bundle tagging.
deliveryGuidance: Use externally or through a future audio-native Paperboy pipeline.

title: Embedding model
description: Local vector fingerprints for bundle search and duplicate detection.
deliveryGuidance: Use for future semantic index bundles.
